consignor.certificate_value: Nouryon Pulp and Perf. Ch. AB BOX 47067 40258 Goteborg Gamlestadsvägen 18 SE-41502, GÖTEBORG Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Nouryon Pulp and Performance Chemicals AB BOX 47067 402 58 Goteborg Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor "Nouryon Pulp and Perf. Ch. AB" has been identified in the invoice as "Nouryon Pulp and Performance Chemicals AB". The variation between 'Perf. Ch.' and 'Performance Chemicals' is considered a commercial name expansion acceptable under rule 4.1.3.4 and 4.1.3.6, as the core company name and address match. The country Sweden matches exactly. This fulfills the company name and country match rules with allowed normalizations on abbreviation and company form.

consignee.certificate_value: Nouryon Chemicals India Pvt ltd NB-102 1st Floor Empire Tower, Reliable Cloud City Campus, Airoli 400708 THANE INDIA
consignee.invoice_value: Nouryon Chemicals India Pvt Ltd. SN PLOT E-18, 19 and 20, C 61 Part 402301 MIDC-MAHAD-RAIGAD INDIA
consignee.motivation: Consignee "Nouryon Chemicals India Pvt ltd" in the certificate matches the invoice consignee "Nouryon Chemicals India Pvt Ltd" appearing in Bill To and Ship To fields. Minor punctuation and address differences are within allowed normalizations. Country India matches exactly. The invoice contains appropriate consignee address information consistent with the certificate.

goods_description.motivation: Goods descriptions in the certificate are explicitly matched by descriptions in the invoice lines with the same material numbers. The certificate contains an explicit invoice reference and invoice date allowing application of general goods description with invoice reference exemption. No interpretation beyond normalization of case, spacing, and punctuation required.

quantity.invoice_value:
3.326,400 KG Gross Weight
5.544,000 KG Gross Weight
2.217,600 KG Gross Weight
quantity.motivation: Quantities and gross weights given in the certificate match exactly the invoice's gross weight values for the corresponding goods. Numeric values match with allowed normalization of decimal separator and thousands separator. The certificate units and weight category (G.W.) are confirmed in the invoice's total gross weights. No conflicts found.

origin.motivation: The certificate origin field states "sweden" and the invoice explicitly states "Country of Origin Sweden" for all goods. The certificate origin 'sweden' matches the invoice's 'Sweden' after normalization of case and spelling. EU origin normalization is applicable but here direct country match suffices.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All principal fields including consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity and origin match exactly between the certificate and the invoice according to applicable rules and allowed normalizations. No mismatches or uncertainties detected.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
